customer_query: My internet has been dropping every evening for the past two weeks. I work from home and this is unacceptable.
expected_response: Acknowledge the issue, check for area outages or congestion, schedule a technician visit, and offer a service credit for the downtime period.
plan_details: Fiber 500 Mbps plan, $79.99/month, no data cap, 2-year contract

customer_query: I want to cancel my service immediately. I found a better deal with your competitor.
expected_response: Attempt retention by reviewing current plan, offer competitive pricing or promotional rate, explain early termination fee if applicable, and process cancellation if customer insists.
plan_details: Cable 200 Mbps plan, $64.99/month, 1 TB data cap, month-to-month

customer_query: I just received a bill for $847 but my plan is only $45 per month. I never authorized any additional charges.
expected_response: Investigate unauthorized charges, check for premium SMS subscriptions or international calls, reverse fraudulent charges, and add a spending cap to prevent recurrence.
plan_details: Prepaid Unlimited Talk & Text, $45/month, 15 GB data, no contract

customer_query: We need to upgrade our business phone system to support 150 employees across three office locations with unified communications.
expected_response: Recommend a cloud-based UCaaS solution with SIP trunking, provide a multi-site deployment plan, quote per-seat pricing, and schedule a technical assessment.
plan_details: Business Voice Pro, $32/seat/month, includes video conferencing, auto-attendant, 50-line capacity per location

customer_query: Someone ported my phone number to another carrier without my permission. I need it back immediately.
expected_response: Escalate as a port-out fraud case, initiate emergency number recovery with the gaining carrier, place a port freeze on the account, and advise the customer to file an FCC complaint and police report.
plan_details: Unlimited Premium, $85/month, 100 GB priority data, international roaming included

customer_query: I'm traveling to Europe next month. What are my options for using my phone abroad without huge roaming charges?
expected_response: Explain included international roaming benefits, offer a temporary international add-on package, compare daily pass vs. monthly international plan pricing, and recommend Wi-Fi calling as a free alternative.
plan_details: Unlimited Standard, $65/month, 50 GB priority data, no international roaming included by default

customer_query: Our company SIM cards are being used to send thousands of SMS messages overnight. We suspect a breach.
expected_response: Immediately suspend affected SIM cards, investigate for SIM-swap or API credential compromise, provide a usage audit report, and recommend implementing SMS rate-limiting and two-factor authentication on the management portal.
plan_details: IoT Fleet Plan, $3.50/SIM/month, 500 MB data + 100 SMS per SIM, 2000 active SIMs

customer_query: I was promised a free phone upgrade when I renewed my contract last month, but I still haven't received it.
expected_response: Verify the promotional offer in the account notes, confirm eligibility and fulfillment status, expedite device shipment if the promise was documented, or escalate to a supervisor if no record exists.
plan_details: Family Plan 4 lines, $160/month total, each line has 30 GB priority data, 24-month contract renewal

customer_query: My elderly mother keeps getting calls from people claiming to be from your company asking for her account PIN and social security number.
expected_response: Confirm this is a phishing scam and not a legitimate company contact, add a fraud alert to the account, set up a verbal passcode, and recommend registering on the Do Not Call list.
plan_details: Home Phone Essential, $29.99/month, unlimited local and long-distance, caller ID included

customer_query: We need 5G coverage analysis for our new warehouse facility. We're planning autonomous guided vehicles that require sub-10ms latency.
expected_response: Schedule an RF site survey, propose a private 5G or CBRS network solution for guaranteed latency, provide SLA options for uptime and latency guarantees, and outline the deployment timeline and hardware requirements.
plan_details: Enterprise 5G Business Critical, custom pricing, dedicated network slice, 99.999% uptime SLA
